name: git-release-cleanup
description: Automatically delete releases, tags, and Docker images across GitHub, GitLab, and container registries

scripts.build: rimraf dist && ncc build src/index.ts -o dist --source-map
scripts.f: (git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR HEAD && git ls-files --others --exclude-standard) | xargs bunx prettier --write --ignore-unknown
scripts.bs: mkdir -p scripts && curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iamvikshan/.github/main/scripts/bootstrap.sh > scripts/bootstrap.sh && chmod +x scripts/bootstrap.sh && scripts/bootstrap.sh
scripts.upd: apt update && apt upgrade -y && bun upgrade && bun update --latest && bun f

author: vikshan
